# Lane 1 (catalog / schema) dependencies.
# Installed in addition to backend/requirements.txt — do NOT edit requirements.txt.
#
# openpyxl is already pinned in requirements.txt; listed here so lane 1 is
# self-describing (the real-catalog loader reads .xlsx via openpyxl).
openpyxl>=3.1.2

# SQLAlchemy + pydantic-settings are also provided by the base requirements.txt
# and are required by the catalog loader / models; no new packages beyond these.
